content.title: A Polish food experience in Boden
content.paragraph1: Nordic Eatery focuses on Polish-inspired comfort food, street food and simple online ordering. Our menu is built around warm, filling dishes that work well for delivery, takeaway and everyday meals.
content.paragraph2: Instead of being a classic burger restaurant, Nordic Eatery is closer to Polish street food with dishes like Maczanka, Knysza, crispy fries and selected comfort food favourites.
content.paragraph3: If you are looking for Polish food in Boden, takeaway near you or something different from standard fast food, Nordic Eatery gives you a fresh local option.

benefits.title: Why try Nordic Eatery?
items: Good for lunch, dinner and casual meals

content.title: Fresh catering food for Boden
content.paragraph1: Nordic Eatery helps make events easier with warm, satisfying food prepared for groups. Our catering is suitable for private parties, office lunches, staff meals, small events and local gatherings in Boden.
content.paragraph2: The menu can include Polish comfort food, burgers, crispy fries, street food and selected dishes depending on the event size and your needs. We focus on food that is easy to serve, filling and enjoyable for guests.
content.paragraph3: Whether you need simple takeaway-style catering or a more planned food setup, contact Nordic Eatery and we will help you find a suitable solution.

items: Catering in Boden for private and company events

items.question: How do I request catering?
items.answer: Use the booking or contact page and send your event date, number of guests and food preferences.

content.title: Fresh takeaway food in Boden
content.paragraph1: Nordic Eatery makes takeaway simple for people in Boden who want warm, filling food without spending time cooking. Our menu includes Polish comfort food, burgers, crispy fries, drinks and street food.
content.paragraph2: Takeaway is a good choice for lunch, dinner, work breaks or casual meals at home. Order online, skip the phone call and pick up your food when it is ready.
content.paragraph3: Our food is prepared fresh after you order, so you get warm and consistent meals that are easy to collect and enjoy.

about.freshText: We cook everything fresh. No shortcuts.
about.fastText: You get your food quickly without losing quality.
about.simpleText: Only what really works. No unnecessary items.
about.tasteText: Street food energy with restaurant quality.
about.finalTitle: Built for people who value good food
about.finalText: No waiting. No overpricing. Just good food done right.

contact.supportText: For order issues, complaints, refunds or payment questions, contact us by email or phone. We handle all customer requests as quickly as possible.
contact.ctaText: Use the booking page to send us your date, time, location and number of guests.

support.title: Need help?
support.subtitle: If you have questions about your order, booking or catering — we are here to help.
support.a1: Usually between 30–40 minutes depending on demand.
support.q2: Can I book the food truck?
support.a2: Yes, go to the Mike’s page or Booking page and send a request.
support.a3: Yes, we provide catering for events, companies and private groups.
support.a4: You can email us directly or use the Contact page.
support.ctaText: Contact us directly and we’ll respond as quickly as possible.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: These terms apply to all orders made through Nordic Eatery.
terms.orderingText: Customers can place orders through our website. All orders are subject to product availability and confirmation.
terms.pricesText: All prices are shown in SEK and include applicable taxes. The final order total is shown before payment.
terms.paymentText: We accept card payments, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Swish and cash when available. Card payments are processed securely through Stripe. Swish payments are processed through Swish.
terms.deliveryText: Orders can be delivered or picked up depending on availability. Delivery times are estimates and may vary depending on demand, weather and distance.
terms.cancellationText: Orders can be cancelled before preparation has started. Once food preparation has started, cancellation may not be possible.
terms.refundsText: If there is a problem with your order, contact us as soon as possible. Refunds may be issued for incorrect, missing or failed orders after review.
terms.contactText: For questions, complaints, refunds or payment issues, contact us at kontakt@nordiceatery.se or by phone.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: We respect your privacy and handle your personal data responsibly.
privacy.dataText: When you place an order, we may collect your name, phone number, address, order details and payment status.
privacy.usageText: We use your data to process orders, deliver food, handle payments, provide customer support and improve our service.
privacy.paymentsText: Payments may be processed through Stripe and Swish. We do not store full card details on our website.
privacy.storageText: Order information may be stored securely in our systems for operational, accounting and support purposes.
privacy.rightsText: You may contact us to request access, correction or deletion of your personal data where legally possible.
privacy.contactText: For privacy questions, contact us at kontakt@nordiceatery.se.

checkout.emptyText: Add food to your cart before checkout.
checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.subtitle: Add your delivery details and choose how you want to pay.
checkout.name: Name
checkout.swishInfo: Pay with Swish after placing the order. Your order will be marked as awaiting payment until the payment is confirmed.
checkout.cardInfo: You will be redirected to Stripe. Card, Apple Pay and Google Pay are processed securely.
checkout.securePaymentsText: Card and Apple Pay are handled securely through Stripe. Swish will be available after bank approval.
checkout.taxInfo: All prices are shown in SEK and include applicable taxes.
checkout.bottomInfo: Delivery estimate: 30–40 min. For complaints or refunds, contact kontakt@nordiceatery.se.
checkout.stripeError: Stripe payment could not be started.
checkout.generalError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.subtitle: Internal guide for managing orders, products, kitchen display, staff roles, settings and deployment.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.item1: Shows today revenue, orders, active deliveries and low stock items.
dashboard.item2: Recent orders are loaded from Supabase orders table.
dashboard.item3: Menu snapshot is loaded from Supabase products table.
dashboard.item4: Greeting is shown only on Dashboard and can later be animated.

orders.title: Orders
orders.description: Order management for owner and admin.
orders.item1: Orders page shows all latest orders from Supabase.
orders.item2: Statuses: new, preparing, ready, completed, cancelled.
orders.item3: Admin can move order through the kitchen flow.
orders.item4: Cancelled orders are not removed from database, only marked as cancelled.

kitchen.title: Kitchen display
kitchen.item1: Kitchen display should be opened at /kitchen-display.
kitchen.item2: Cook role can access kitchen-display without seeing the full CRM.
kitchen.item3: Kitchen board auto-refreshes orders every 3 seconds.
kitchen.item4: Card payments are shown only after payment_status is paid.

products.title: Products & Menu
products.description: Product catalogue and menu category structure.
products.item2: Create and edit products through CRM product form.
products.item3: Use matching categories: maczanka, knysza, fries, drinks.
products.item4: Public menu only shows available products with stock or untracked stock.

staff.title: Staff roles
staff.description: Role-based access for CRM and kitchen.
staff.item3: Admin can manage products, orders, settings and analytics.

settingsSection.title: Settings
settingsSection.item1: Settings are stored in business_settings table.
settingsSection.item2: Owner/admin can update business information, delivery and payment options.
settingsSection.item3: Swish is currently marked as planned until integration is ready.
settingsSection.item4: These settings can later be connected to checkout, footer and contact pages.

payments.title: Payments
payments.description: Payment logic for checkout and CRM.
payments.item1: Cash orders can appear immediately as unpaid.
payments.item2: Card orders should become visible to kitchen only after paid status.
payments.item3: Swish integration is planned as the next payment feature.
payments.item4: Stripe can be used for card, Apple Pay and Google Pay.

deployment.title: Deployment checklist
deployment.description: Before deploying to Vercel or production.
deployment.item1: Check that Supabase environment variables are set in Vercel.
deployment.item3: Run npm run build locally before deployment.
deployment.item4: Verify admin routes, orders, products, kitchen-display and settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage restaurant information, delivery options, payment settings and operational preferences.
settings.emptyTable: Business settings table is empty. Run the SQL seed query in Supabase first.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.subtitle: Manage customer bookings, guest count, confirmation status and reservation notes.

menuAdmin.title: Menu
menuAdmin.subtitle: Organize your restaurant menu by categories, availability, stock and product performance.

analytics.noOrdersDescription: Analytics will appear when orders are created.

account.photoUploaded: Photo uploaded. Save changes to update your profile.
account.permissionsDescription: Permissions are based on your current staff role.

products.title: Products
products.name: Name
products.subtitle: Subtitle
products.stockOn: Stock tracking is ON. This item will be hidden from the customer menu when stock is 0.
products.stockOff: Stock tracking is OFF. Use this for dishes prepared to order, like Maczanka or Knysza.
products.stockZero: Stock is 0. This product will be hidden from the customer menu.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Manage product stock. If tracked stock is 0, the product is hidden from the customer menu.
